name: heyhomex-load-testing
description: HeyHomex load testing project using k6 and TypeScript

scripts.test:smoke: npm run build && k6 run -e PROFILE=smoke dist/buyer-smoke-flow.js
scripts.test:load: npm run build && k6 run -e PROFILE=load dist/buyer-smoke-flow.js
scripts.test:stress: npm run build && k6 run -e PROFILE=stress dist/buyer-smoke-flow.js
